overall.description: First-person perspective of walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The path is surrounded by dense vegetation and trees, with no other people or vehicles visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, illuminating the way ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with scattered leaves and small rocks, illuminated by flashlight beam
dense green bushes lining the left side of the path
tall thin tree trunks visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path ahead is illuminated by a warm artificial light source, revealing leafy bushes on the left and tall trees on the right. The scene is quiet and empty, with no other visible activity or agents present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded forest trail shrouded in the deep darkness of night. It begins by advancing down a narrow dirt path, where a warm artificial light cuts through the gloom to reveal the immediate surroundings. As the camera moves forward, the beam illuminates a dense corridor of leafy bushes on the left and towering trees on the right. The scene remains quiet and empty, maintaining a steady pace through the isolated wilderness before the light continues to carve a path through the thick vegetation.
